name: biookf
description: BioOKF: curate, visualize, and reason over biomedical Open Knowledge Format bundles. Bundles the bokf MCP server (curation + analysis + live BioOKF Studio GUI control), the bokf CLI, and the prebuilt BioOKF Studio desktop app. The Studio is shipped precompiled; the first run downloads the binaries for your platform from GitHub Releases, so no local compile is required.
